rationale: Bug hunt on SFXEngine (last committed feature): sfx_engine.gd and audio_integration.gd reviewed — 0 bugs. All referenced classes (Run3DController, HubScreen, EndRunScreen, GameFlowController, MusicManagerV2, StemsMusicManager, SFXRecipes, SFXRecipesAmbient) confirmed to exist. Feature: boost_weight faction card weighting (q-20260415-010, creator chose A). Cards with ADD_REPUTATION effects targeting a faction where player has rep >= 50 are weighted 3x in event and fastroute generators. Implements bible FACTION_THRESHOLD_CONTENT unlock gate.
next_cycle_plan: Bug hunt C14 (merlin_card_system.gd faction boost logic). Then feature: one of — GFC wrap BroceliandeForest3D (q-20260415-011), run_history population (q-20260415-002), or biome walk event pools.
